news.t: Jensen Quality Growth ETF (JGRW) Surpasses $100 Million in Assets Under Management
Jensen Quality Growth ETF Marks One-Year Anniversary with Steady Growth
Jensen Investment Management Launches the Jensen Quality Growth ETF (NYSE:JGRW)

holdings.infoBox: JGRW is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.22%, Amazon.com at 6.77%, NVIDIA at 6.66%, Microsoft at 6.58%, and Apple at 6.26%.

overview.description: The Jensen Quality Growth ETF (JGRW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital growth through an actively managed portfolio of US stocks exhibiting growth and quality characteristics. JGRW was launched on Aug 13, 2024 and is issued by Jensen.
